checkin.journal:
I am fine, was better in morning in evening I feel I stared too much in screens before sleep, but also cosita is sicky so was weird day, in general I think now the biggest issue will be how to entertain myself and keep smiling - I need games and smiling - this keeps me going 100%
Bloating quite some - did eat normal pasta today and a bit of bread but still perhaps a bit still from day before
